recommendations.title: Werewolf of London
recommendations.overview: A strange animal attack turns a botanist into a bloodthirsty monster.

recommendations.title: Thanatomorphose
recommendations.overview: Bruised from a night of rough sex, a young woman is shocked to find that her body, rather than healing itself, has inexplicably begun to rot. Swept up in the strange sensual experiences brought on by her slowly decaying form, she tries desperately to

recommendations.title: Above the Shadows
recommendations.overview: A young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible must find her way back with the help of the one man who can see her.

recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.overview: A young woman is followed by an unknown supernatural force after a sexual encounter.

recommendations.title: Medusa
recommendations.overview: After being bitten by a lethal snake, a young woman experiences changes in her senses and appearance, as she sheds her old self and slowly turns into a deadly weapon.

recommendations.title: Hatching
recommendations.overview: 12 year old Tinja is desperate to please her mother, a woman obsessed with presenting the image of a perfect family. One night, Tinja finds a strange egg. What hatches is beyond belief.

recommendations.title: Bulbbul
recommendations.overview: A child bride grows up to be an enigmatic woman presiding over her household, harboring a painful past as supernatural murders of men plague her village.

recommendations.title: A Mermaid in Paris
recommendations.overview: A man rescues a mermaid in Paris and slowly falls in love with her.

recommendations.title: I Lost My Body
recommendations.overview: A story of Naoufel, a young man who is in love with Gabrielle. In another part of town, a severed hand escapes from a dissection lab, determined to find its body again.

recommendations.title: Martyrs
recommendations.overview: A woman and her childhood friend seek out revenge on those who victimized and abused them.
